api/src/test/resources/__snapshots__/Qua.general_idea: Update JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in newer Java/Quarkus versions.
Add a missing newline at the end of the file to comply with POSIX standards and linter rules.
Update JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21 environments.
Ensure the file ends with a newline character to comply with POSIX standards and linter rules.
Update JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in newer Java/Quarkus versions.
Add a missing newline at the end of the file to comply with POSIX standards and linter rules.

acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM version from 2.13.0.Final to 3.6.0 to support the Java 21 migration and access newer features.
Update the Playwright dependency version from 1.26.0 to 1.29.0 to ensure compatibility with the updated Quarkus version.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new runtime environment.
Upgrade Kotlin compiler version to 1.9.0 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and access newer language features.
Upgrade Quarkus platform BOM from 2.13.0.Final to 3.6.0, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Align Quarkus devtools version with the new platform version 3.6.0.
Align Quarkus base codestarts version with the new platform version 3.6.0.
Replace blocking RESTEasy dependencies with their reactive counterparts (quarkus-resteasy-reactive) required by Quarkus 3.
Replace blocking REST Client dependencies with their reactive counterparts (quarkus-rest-client-reactive) required by Quarkus 3.
Add explicit Jackson integration for the new reactive REST stack, replacing the implicit dependency from the old blocking stack.
Add explicit Jackson integration for the new reactive REST client stack.
Remove explicit Undertow dependency as Quarkus 3 defaults to Vert.x and manages the HTTP server differently.
Remove the Jackson dependency for the old blocking RESTEasy stack which is no longer used.
Upgrade Quarkus Quinoa extension to version 2.0.5 to match Quarkus 3 compatibility.
Upgrade Quarkus JGit extension to version 2.3.1 for compatibility with the new platform.
Upgrade AssertJ testing library to version 3.24.2.
Replace Google Analytics Java library with Segment Analytics Java library.
Add Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito extension for testing support.
Correct the snapshot override version for Quarkus devtools in the profile activation.

.github/workflows/acceptance-test.tests..general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for acceptance tests.
.github/workflows/acceptance-test.tests..human_impl: Changed 'Set up JDK 17' to 'Set up JDK 21' and 'java-version: openjdk17' to 'java-version: openjdk21' in the workflow file.

.github/workflows/api.tests.actions.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 to align with the target Java version.

.github/workflows/frontend.tests.actions.general_idea: Add GitHub Actions step to install Node.js 18 for frontend tests.

.github/workflows/library.publish.action.general_idea: Update the Node.js version in the CI workflow from 14.x to 18.x to align with the project's migration to newer runtime standards.

.github/workflows/quarkus-ecosystem.acti.general_idea: Update the Java version used in the CI workflow from 11 to 21 to align with the target JDK.

Makefile.general_idea: Decompose the monolithic 'dev' target into specific targets for frontend, library watching, and combined development to support a more modular development process.
Makefile.human_impl: Replaced 'dev: cd api && mvn quarkus:dev' with 'dev-frontend', 'watch-lib', 'dev-lib', and 'dev-lib-staging' targets.
